title: odontites foliosus
intro: Odontites foliosus, also known as toothwort or downy toothwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Orobanchaceae. This parasitic plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Odontites foliosus include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and aiding in the recovery of respiratory infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia.
